name: test-submission
description: Collect one local-artifact or fixed-revision SVN product-material submission and send a fail-closed request through IMAP/SMTP.

interface.longDescription: Use one credential-free configuration and one controller across MCP, Skill, standalone CLI, and an unattended retry scheduler. Every submission explicitly chooses a module and produces a signed machine block; local artifacts are previewed locally, while fixed-revision SVN sources defer material evidence to the protected GitLab CI gate.
defaultPrompt: Run test submission setup with zero manual JSON editing.
Submit one explicit local package or fixed-revision SVN source for a kernel, client, or server module to the submission gate mailbox.
Retry any pending submission mail and show local status.
Diagnose dependency lock, mail account, local preview, and SVN deferred-evidence readiness.
